case_title: ALEX MARPLE VS. MICHAEL PERNELL MITCHELL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MARPLE, ALEX

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARPLE, ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, MICHAEL PERNELL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, MICHAEL PERNELL
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-11-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ALEX MARPLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG . 506 PLAINTIFF ALEX MARPLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-08-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ALEX MARPLE IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.
